subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! Praise be to God that for a few days ye were companions and intimately associated in this land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی حمد خدا را که ایامی چند در این دیار معاشر و مانوس دیدار بودید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
